race.comment: EQUINOX LEGEND (5) talented gelding who chipped away late on resumption with a respectable fifth over 1400m at this track. Ready for this trip and further and kept up to the mark with a 1045m tick over trial. Can make better use of the good gate today and is expected to go close. COPARTNER PEGASUS (3) should get a comfortable lead and is ready to win fifth-up. Anchored with the 59kg when no match for the smart Satono Jasmine running third over 1600m at Gosford. Finds an easier race and is capable of shedding his Maiden tag. CLANWILLIAM (2) was beaten for early speed and got further back than anticipated with a fast finishing third over 1400m at Randwick Kensington. Well drawn and desperate for this trip and further now. Value contender. WEE WINN (11) keeps progressing as she gets out in trip. Savaged the line from the low draw with a narrow third over 1600m at this track. Apprentice sticks and is sure to be thereabouts.
